How to play

  • Guess the hidden five-letter word in six tries.
  • Daily is one shared puzzle a day — everyone gets the same word, so you can compare and race.
  • Practice is unlimited offline play; pick any level from common (easy) to rare (hard).
  • Tap Stats to see your streak and guess history, and to share your daily result.
  • Green right spot   Amber wrong spot   Grey not in word.
